use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons in forms and landing pages
Destructive action buttons with warning styling
Outline-style secondary actions for multi-step workflows
Icon-only buttons for compact toolbar interfaces
Ghost-style navigation links with hover feedback
ai_summary: A versatile atomic button component with multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon). Built with Radix UI Slot for composition, class-variance-authority for variant handling, and Tailwind CSS for styling. Supports disabled states, focus-visible rings, and asChild prop for polymorphic rendering.
